Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base image from a Debian-based Maven/JDK 11 image to an Alpine-based Liberica JDK 21 image to align with the Java 21 migration.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application requires Java 21 features and Spring Boot 3 compatibility; the old JDK 11 image is incompatible with the target runtime requirements.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace Debian package management (apt-get) with Alpine package management (apk) for installing system dependencies.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image is Alpine Linux, which does not support apt-get; using apt-get would result in a build failure.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Update Node.js installation from NodeSource setup script for Node 12 to NVM installation for Node 16.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Node 12 is end-of-life and incompatible with modern build tools; the old installation method is removed in favor of a version manager compatible with the new environment.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Remove Heroku CLI installation as it is no longer required for the deployment strategy.
Add Maven installation via apk since the new base image does not include Maven by default.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The build process requires Maven to compile the project; the new base image lacks Maven, causing build failure if not installed.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add libstdc++ dependency required for native libraries or specific Java components on Alpine.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Some Java native libraries or dependencies may require libstdc++ on Alpine Linux; missing it could cause runtime linkage errors.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add Git installation to support build-time git information retrieval.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The build process or application startup may rely on git metadata; Alpine images often lack git by default.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Change the copy strategy to include the entire directory (including .git) to support git-based configuration.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application or build process relies on git metadata (e.g., for versioning or dokku settings); excluding .git would break this functionality.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Set PRODUCTION environment variable to true to configure the application for production mode.
Add explicit Maven build step to compile the application during image build.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The previous image likely relied on a pre-built artifact or a different build strategy; the new setup requires explicit compilation to produce the JAR.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Change the entrypoint from a generic bash shell to running the compiled JAR file.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The container must start the application; the previous CMD was likely for debugging or interactive use, while the new ENTRYPOINT ensures the app runs automatically.

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add import for React Toastify CSS to ensure toast notifications are styled correctly.
Add import for MSW Storybook addon to enable API mocking in stories.
Initialize MSW with a dynamic service worker URL that handles both localhost and remote hosting.
Add the MSW decorator to the global decorators array to apply mocking to all stories.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.after:
mswDecorator, // provide the MSW decorator globally
];

frontend/docs-index/_config.yml.general_idea: Rename the Jekyll site title from a QA-specific label to a generic documentation title.
Remove a duplicate placeholder configuration entry for repo_name that was likely intended to be overridden by CI.
Update the remaining repo_name placeholder to a generic TBD value.

frontend/docs-index/_layouts/default.htm.general_idea: Update the HTML title tag to display the repository name instead of the page-specific title.
Remove the external stylesheet link from the document head.
Refactor the main heading text to be more descriptive and generic.

frontend/package.json.general_idea: Add explicit Node.js engine constraint to package.json.
Add nock dependency for HTTP mocking.
Add msw dependency for service worker mocking.
Remove inline eslintConfig block from package.json.
Increase Jest coverage thresholds from 90% to 100%.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.3 to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6 APIs required for modern development.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compiling with Java 17 settings on a Java 21 project may miss new language features or fail if strict source/target checks are enabled in the compiler plugin.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade spring-cloud-gateway-mvc from 3.0.1 to 4.1.3 to align with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x (compatible with Boot 2.6) is incompatible with Spring Boot 3; version 4.1.3 is required for Spring Boot 3.3 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated springfox-boot-starter with springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui for API documentation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 and Spring Framework 6 due to changes in the Servlet API and Spring MVC internals; it will fail to compile or start.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove spring-boot-starter-data-mongodb dependency as it is no longer used or compatible in this configuration.
pom.xml.why_exists: The dependency was commented out/removed, likely due to migration issues or architectural change; keeping it might cause conflicts if not properly configured for Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add playwright dependency for browser automation testing.
Add wiremock-jre8-standalone dependency for HTTP mocking in tests.
Add awaitility dependency for asynchronous testing support.
Add spring-security-config dependency to manage security context in async threads.
Add commons-csv dependency for CSV processing.
Configure maven-compiler-plugin with -proc:full to ensure full annotation processing.
Update maven-surefire-plugin to version 3.0.0-M5 and configure fork node for better test execution.
Add git-commit-id-maven-plugin to generate git properties during build.
Update jacoco-maven-plugin from 0.8.7 to 0.8.10 for better Java 21 support.
Update pitest-maven from 1.7.3 to 1.17.0 for mutation testing compatibility.
Update pitest-junit5-plugin from 0.14 to 1.2.1 to match pitest version.
Update frontend-maven-plugin node version from v12.12.0 to v16.20.0 for modern frontend tooling.
Rename artifactId from 'example' to 'happycows' to reflect project identity.
Update package paths in jacoco and pitest exclusions from 'example' to 'happiercows'.
